data.title: BNB Surpasses 840 USDT with a Narrowed 3.76% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 22, 2025, 01:31 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 840 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 841.47998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.76% decrease in 24 hours.

Strategy's executive vice president sold over 58,000 shares of MSTR in the past 10 days, cashing out a total of $13 million.

data.title: CZ disclosed that its counterparty's long positions had unrealized losses exceeding $36 million, with profits reduced to $6.42 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, 0x9ee, formerly CZ's publicly disclosed counterparty address, has become the undisputed number one loser on Hyperliquid's 24H/7D loss leaderboard. Its current long positions in ETH and XRP, totaling $220 million, are showing a floating loss of $36.07 million, with the $144 million ETH position alone showing a floating loss of $22.71 million. The account's peak profit of $61.88 million has now shrunk to only $6.42 million.

data.title: Solana’s Next Major Wave Depends On How The Price Behaves Inside This Support
data.description:
Solana’s price is now sitting inside a crucial support zone, and what happens in this region will decide whether the next major bullish wave can truly begin. The broader correction has brought SOL to a defining moment, where micro-level price behavior will determine if buyers can regain control or if deeper levels must be tested first. Market Correction Nears First Major Support Zone According to a recent update by More Crypto Online, SOL still maintains the chance to begin a larger upward move in this current cycle. The analyst notes that the market has been in a correction since mid-September and has now reached its first major structural support zone, putting the asset at a crucial juncture
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solanas-next-major-wave/

data.title: Strategy's executive vice president sold over 58,000 shares of MSTR in the past 10 days, cashing out a total of $13 million.
data.description: According to a post on the X platform by Bitcoin Treasuries, Strategy Executive Vice President Shao Weiming sold 58,004 shares of MSTR stock over the past 10 days at an average price of $222, totaling $13 million. The most recent transaction was yesterday, when 5,200 shares of MSTR were sold at an average price of $202, for a total transaction value of $1 million.

data.title: Italy secures first Moody’s upgrade in two decades
data.description:
Italy receives its first Moody’s upgrade since 2002 thanks to Premier Giorgia Meloni's victory.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/italy-gets-moodys-upgrade-in-two-decades/

data.title: Law firm Gordon Rees escapes sanctions over AI errors in bankruptcy case
data.description:
Reckless use of generative AI in legal proceedings has resulted in the personal reprimand of attorney Cassie Preston of the Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani law firm by a U. S. bankruptcy judge. In a Chapter 11 bankruptcy case filed by Jackson Hospital & Clinic in Alabama, U. S. Bankruptcy Judge, Christopher Hawkins, decided not to impose formal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gordon-rees-escapes-sanctions-ai-errors/

data.title: The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad" sold Bitcoin for $2.25 million at a price of $90,000, triggering a large-scale sell-off.
data.description: Robert Kiyosaki, author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad," announced on the X platform that he sold Bitcoin worth $2.25 million for approximately $90,000. He had purchased these Bitcoins several years ago at an average price of $6,000. According to him, he will use the proceeds to buy two surgical centers and invest in an advertising company. Furthermore, he emphasized, "I remain very bullish and optimistic about Bitcoin and will gain more as my positive cash flow increases." However, this move has drawn considerable criticism, with many commenting that his previous advocacy of buying and holding Bitcoin long-term contradicts his actual actions.

data.title: Bitwise CIO: Now is an excellent buying opportunity for 2026 and long-term investors.
data.description: In a recent interview with CNBC, Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan stated, "I believe this (the recent crypto market crash) presents an excellent buying opportunity for long-term investors looking towards 2026 and beyond."

data.title: Strategy Executive Sells MSTR Shares for $13 Million
data.description: According to PANews, Strategy Executive Vice President Shao Wei-Ming has sold 58,004 shares of MSTR stock over the past 10 days. The shares were sold at an average price of $222 each, resulting in a total cash-out of $13 million.

data.title: Bitwise analyst: "Bitcoin's biggest pain point" lies between Strategy's cost price of $73,000 and BlackRock's IBIT cost price of $84,000.
data.description: According to André Dragosch, Head of European Research at Bitwise, the key pain point area for Bitcoin's price (i.e., the main cost base level for institutional investors, currently determining the bottom of this cycle) is primarily located between BlackRock's IBIT cost base price of $84,000 and Strategy's (formerly MicroStrategy) cost base price of approximately $73,000. Dragosch points out that the final cycle bottom for Bitcoin typically occurs near price levels where large institutional buyers face the greatest declines. These price levels often mark what he calls "sell-off pricing"—the moment of a price crash. The market undergoes a complete reset, forcing sellers to yield.

data.title: The user ranked sixth on Polymarket's sports betting profit leaderboard lost all their funds after a failed bet on NHL hockey, all in just one week, after their assets had grown 760 times in a month.
data.description: According to a post by Ricardo Ah Huang, a blogger on the X platform, Mayuravarma, who ranked sixth on Polymarket's sports betting profit leaderboard, recently lost all his profits after betting $1.2 million on NHL hockey games and losing. It's understood that Mayuravarma grew his capital from $5,000 to $3.8 million in just one month, ranking sixth on Polymarket's sports betting profit leaderboard and once dubbed the "God of Sports Prediction," but went from $3.8 million to zero in just one week.

data.title: Bitcoiners perk up as odds of a December Fed rate cut almost double
data.description:
Some Bitcoiners are speculating that the significant surge in the odds of a Fed rate cut in December may lead to Bitcoin finding a price “bottom here for now. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoiners-us-federal-reserve-rate-cut-odds-surge-december-btc-price?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fcb%3D1tgkxp%26_q%3D1763769824883&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale that previously borrowed cryptocurrency to short 66,000 ETH has increased its holdings by 23,995 ETH, bringing its total holdings to $1.35 billion.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale that "previously borrowed to short 66,000 ETH" has purchased another 23,995 ETH from Binance, worth $65.13 million. Its current holdings are 489,694 ETH, worth $1.35 billion.

data.title: Grayscale Dogecoin and XRP Trust ETFs to Debut on NYSE Arca
data.description: According to PANews, Grayscale's Dogecoin Trust ETF (GDOG) and XRP Trust ETF (GXRP) are set to launch on the NYSE Arca market on Monday. This marks the first time U.S. investors will have the opportunity to invest in DOGE and XRP through regulated public markets.

data.title: Coinbase Derivatives to expand 24/7 futures trading for bevy of altcoins including ADA, AVAX, DOGE and SHIB
data.description:
Coinbase's CFTC-regulated derivatives arm plans to launch 24/7 trading and "perp-style" futures for nearly a dozen altcoins.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/380028/coinbase-derivatives-to-expand-24-7-futures-trading-for-bevy-of-altcoins-including-ada-avax-doge-and-shib?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Cardano Network Disrupted by 'Poisoned' Transaction Attack
data.description:

data.title: Solo Bitcoin Miner Hits the Jackpot, Winning $266K BTC Reward
data.description:
A solo miner earned a Bitcoin bounty for mining the network’s 924,569th block, securing $266,000 worth of the asset against incredible odds.
source: https://decrypt.co/349689/solo-bitcoin-miner-hits-jackpot-winning-266k-btc-reward
